title: Pawtucket, RI — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Pawtucket, RI: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Pawtucket is a city in RI with a population of 72,000. Birthplace of the American Industrial Revolution with the Slater Mill and McCoy Stadium.
